FILEPATH="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILEPATH" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd /Users/jason/dev/ai-stack/ai-coding-cli && if command -v tsgo >/dev/null 2>&1; then CURRENT=$(bun run ts:check 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS' || echo 0); if [ -f .claude/.tscheck-baseline ]; then BASELINE=$(cat .claude/.tscheck-baseline); else echo "âš ď¸Ź  .claude/.tscheck-baseline missing â€” create it with 'bun run ts:check 2>&1 | grep -c \"error TS\" > .claude/.tscheck-baseline' to re-establish drift tracking. Treating current count as baseline for this run." >&2; BASELINE=$CURRENT; fi; if [ "$CURRENT" -gt "$BASELINE" ]; then echo "âťŚ ts:check error count increased: baseline=$BASELINE â†’ current=$CURRENT (+$((CURRENT-BASELINE))). New errors:" >&2; bun run ts:check 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | tail -10 >&2; elif [ "$CURRENT" -lt "$BASELINE" ]; then echo "âś… ts:check decreased: baseline=$BASELINE â†’ current=$CURRENT (-$((BASELINE-CURRENT))). Consider updating .claude/.tscheck-baseline."; else echo "âś… ts:check baseline holding ($CURRENT errors)"; fi; else echo '[hook] tsgo not installed, skipping type check'; fi;; esac
